Farming Guide

Master the economy and efficiently acquire game resources

Home›Farming Guide

Economy System Overview

RF ONLINE NEXT features a transparent economy with 1-on-1 player trading and guild auction system

Core Economic Features

  • Transparent Trading — 1-on-1 player trading & guild auction system with open resource distribution
  • Pity System — Probability-based items have pity protection, reducing farming risk and stabilizing income expectations
  • Holystone Economy — Holystone is the most valuable universal currency; all high-end trades settle in Holystone
  • Cross-Platform — PC and mobile data sync, making farming more flexible and convenient
  • Guild Dividends — Mine War earnings distributed by guild contribution — active guild members earn more

Recommended Farming Routes

Route 1: Mine War Farming

The core resource acquisition method — participate for stable income

Profit Rating
High Profit
Time per Run
30-60 min
Main Drops
Holystone, Legendary Materials, Equipment Blueprints

Route 2: Crafting Farming

Gather materials → Craft equipment → Sell on Exchange — ideal for players with ample time

Profit Rating
Med-High Profit
Time Investment
2-4 hrs/day
Main Drops
Epic Equipment, Enhancement Materials, Gold

Route 3: World Boss Hunting

Hunt field bosses for rare drops — requires some gear foundation

Profit Rating
High Profit
Respawn Interval
4-8 hrs
Main Drops
Legendary Equipment, Arcane Essence, Rare Materials

Route 4: Daily Dungeon Sweeps

Stable but lower yield — ideal for players with fragmented time

Profit Rating
Stable Income
Daily Time
30-45 min
Main Drops
Gold, Enhancement Stones, XP Potions

Recommended Farming Classes

ClassEfficiencyBest RouteRecommendationNotes
Punisher⭐⭐⭐⭐World Boss, Daily DungeonsHighly RecommendedSafe & efficient ranged DPS, low skill floor, top farming pick for beginners
Cipher⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Mine Wars, Daily DungeonsHighly RecommendedBest AoE clearing efficiency, explosive Mine War DPS, beginner-friendly
Ghost⭐⭐⭐World Boss SoloAdvanced PickHigh burst but squishy, needs some skill foundation, balances PVP & farming
Dreadnought⭐⭐⭐Mine War FrontlineWhale PickCore Mine War tank, top pick for paying players pushing PVP rankings
Technician⭐⭐⭐All-Round Support FarmingTeam PickDoubles party farming efficiency, high market demand

Advanced Farming Tips

Multi-Account Strategy

Players with the means can consider multi-account farming. Use cloud phones or emulators for multi-instance, each account focused on different farming routes for 2-3x daily income. Follow game rules and avoid using cheats.

Market Timing

The first hour after Mine Wars ends sees the highest exchange price volatility — best time to sell materials. Stockpile enhancement materials before version updates, then sell immediately after for premium profits.

  1. Daily must-dos: Mine War participation + all daily dungeon sweeps + guild check-in
  2. Compare prices on the Exchange before selling — don't blindly list at the lowest price
  3. Weekend double drop events are the golden farming period — prioritize your time
  4. Join an active guild — Mine War guild dividends provide stable income
  5. Focus on deeply optimizing 1-2 farming routes — more efficient than spreading thin
  6. Utilize the Bio Suit switching system — change to optimal classes for different farming scenarios
  7. Watch for version updates — new content launches often bring farming bonus periods
